source_text: написать 4 описания внешности демониц в разных образах [проверить, что разные образы, разный цвет глаз, разный цвет волос, разные позы, в описании должны быть элементы, по которым даже без указания расы понятно, что перед тобой демоница, стиль: аниме, должен быть явно указан в описании]
discovered: Each description must correspond to a distinct visual "image" or "look," ensuring no two descriptions share the same overall aesthetic or costume theme.
Within each description, the eye color and hair color must be explicitly different from those in the other three descriptions.
The pose depicted in each description must be unique and not repeated across the four descriptions.

The text must contain specific visual cues (e.g., skin texture, tail, horns, wings, specific clothing style) that allow an observer to identify the character as a demoness even if the word "demon" or a specific race name is omitted.
The writing style and artistic reference point must be explicitly defined as "anime" within the text of each description.
Exactly four separate descriptions must be produced.
Each description should be detailed enough to form a complete visual scene without relying on external context.
